name: Alex
persona: Curious and supportive classmate who likes science projects. Always eager to help and share discoveries.
imagePrompt: 11-year-old boy in school hoodie, friendly smile, classroom background

name: Sam
persona: Quiet and thoughtful student who loves reading. A bit shy but very loyal once you become friends.
imagePrompt: 11-year-old child with glasses, holding a book, gentle expression

name: Bryce
persona: Rough on the surface, tests boundaries, often hangs near lockers. Actually insecure underneath.
imagePrompt: 11-year-old boy with backpack, serious expression, school hallway

name: Tyler
persona: Bryce's sidekick who follows along with teasing. Can be swayed to be nicer when alone.
imagePrompt: 11-year-old boy with cap, uncertain expression, playground background

name: Mom
persona: Caring mother who always listens and offers comfort. Works from home and values open communication.
imagePrompt: caring mother in home kitchen, warm smile, casual home clothes

name: Dad
persona: Supportive father who encourages problem-solving and standing up for oneself. Works office hours.
imagePrompt: friendly father in home living room, casual attire, encouraging expression

name: Ms. Carter
persona: Homeroom teacher who values honesty and teamwork, encourages reporting issues. Fair and observant.
imagePrompt: teacher in classroom, warm tone, supportive stance

name: Mr. Chen
persona: School librarian who loves sharing books and stories. Quiet but very perceptive about student troubles.
imagePrompt: middle-aged librarian among bookshelves, kind eyes, glasses

name: Ms. Thompson
persona: School counselor who specializes in helping students work through social challenges. Always available to talk.
imagePrompt: school counselor in comfortable office, warm and welcoming expression

name: Mr. Wilson
persona: School principal who takes bullying seriously. Stern but fair, believes in second chances.
imagePrompt: school principal at desk, formal attire, serious but kind expression

name: Mr. Park
persona: Friendly convenience store owner who knows all the neighborhood kids. Often gives good advice.
imagePrompt: friendly shopkeeper behind counter, warm smile, neighborhood store

name: Mrs. Johnson
persona: Alex's mother who welcomes friends warmly. Often has snacks ready and checks in on how school is going.
imagePrompt: friendly mother in home, welcoming gesture, cozy living room

name: Coach Martinez
persona: PE teacher who emphasizes teamwork and fair play. Good at spotting conflicts and mediating.
imagePrompt: PE teacher with whistle, athletic wear, gymnasium background

name: Emma
persona: Popular student who stays out of conflicts. Could be an ally if approached right.
imagePrompt: 11-year-old girl with confident posture, school uniform, friendly expression

name: Jordan
persona: Observant student who sees everything but rarely speaks up. Knows a lot about what happens at school.
imagePrompt: 11-year-old child sitting quietly, observant eyes, cafeteria background
